detail: Four Python verification commands in the plan (tasks 1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 2.4) failed at parse time with SyntaxError: unterminated string literal. Cause: PowerShell outer double-quote parsing stripped backslashes from \ embedded inside Python string literals, leaving Python with unescaped " characters. Fix applied: replaced PS outer double-quotes with single-quotes and inverted Python inner quote style. All four commands now run cleanly against the real target file (returning False pre-implementation, as expected). One additional task (2.5) had a SyntaxWarning from \d in a non-raw string; fixed by using r-string.

title: RED runner notExpectedSignals prefix-wildcard collides with locked S12-COMBO-BranchC signal name
detail: test-cold-outreach-s13-replay.ps1 line 139 used $_ -like "$notExpectedSignal*" for notExpectedSignals. Because the locked Branch C signal name S12-COMBO-BranchC starts with S12-COMBO, notExpected S12-COMBO* always matches S12-COMBO-BranchC, making fixtures that assert BOTH expected S12-COMBO-BranchC AND notExpected S12-COMBO mathematically unsatisfiable (proven empirically). Fixtures unchanged; runner corrected to exact match ($_ -eq $notExpectedSignal) which is stricter and still catches a real Branch A/B regression. Stage-4 original backed up at backups/pre-edit/test-cold-outreach-s13-replay.ps1.stage4-original.
resolution: minimal exact-match correction applied; flagged for orchestrator/Stage-4 review

detail: scripts/test-live-dry-run.ps1 is agent-incompatible (requires interactive Microsoft Graph auth).
